layers.command: RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/sh -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/sh -c curl -fsSL -o /usr/local/bin/kubectl         "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v${KUBECTL_VERSION}/bin/linux/${TARGETARCH}/kubectl"     && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubectl     && kubectl version --client # buildkit
RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/sh -c groupadd --gid 1001 kubectl     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid kubectl --create-home --shell /bin/bash kubectl # buildkit

RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c curl -fsSL -o /usr/local/bin/kubectl         "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v${KUBECTL_VERSION}/bin/linux/${TARGETARCH}/kubectl"     && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubectl     && kubectl version --client # buildkit
RUN |2 KUBECTL_VERSION=1.36.2 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/sh -c groupadd --gid 1001 kubectl     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid kubectl --create-home --shell /bin/bash kubectl # buildkit
